name: Sorcerer: Metamagic Burst — Quickened + Twinned + Elemental Affinity
description: A level 5 Draconic Sorcery (Red) sorcerer unloads metamagic-fueled burst damage on 3 skeletons. Tests: (1) Font of Magic — starting sorceryPoints=5, (2) Metamagic: Quickened Spell (2 SP) to cast Scorching Ray as a BONUS action after Fireball action, bypassing the two-spell rule for leveled spells, (3) Twinned Spell (SP = spell level) to cast Chromatic Orb against two different targets simultaneously, (4) Elemental Affinity (L5 subclass) adds CHA (+4) to one fire-damage roll per round — applied here to Fire Bolt cantrip, (5) falling back to Magic Missile when SP are depleted. This scenario MUST fail if any of those features are missing: unwired metamagic abilities will error on action text, Elemental Affinity missing will make Fire Bolt damage fall short of assertion bounds, and missing sorceryPoints pool will fail the characterResource assertion.

features.name: Font of Magic
features.description: Sorcery Points = sorcerer level (5 at L5)

features.name: Metamagic
features.description: L2: 2 options, L5: +1 option (total 3). Quickened Spell, Twinned Spell, etc.

features.name: Draconic Resilience
features.description: +1 HP per sorcerer level; unarmored AC = 13 + DEX

features.name: Elemental Affinity
features.description: L5: add CHA to damage of one fire spell you cast on your turn (once per round)

actions.comment: === PRE-COMBAT: Verify Font of Magic gives SP=5 at L5. Fails if Font of Magic isn't wired to sorcerer. ===

input.text: I prepare to unleash my draconic magic

actions.comment: Verify sorceryPoints pool exists with 5/5 at L5 Draconic Sorcerer.
=== ROUND 1 ACTION: Fireball (L3 slot). 8d6 fire in 20ft sphere, DEX save DC 15. All 3 skeletons in zone. Server auto-resolves. ===
L3 slot decremented 2→1 (Fireball consumed one). Proves regular leveled spell consumes slots normally before metamagic kicks in.
Alpha took Fireball half (save) of 28 = 14. Starting HP 50 -> 36.

=== R1 BONUS ACTION: Quickened Spell (2 SP) — cast Scorching Ray as a BONUS action. Bypasses two-spell rule because Quickened Metamagic changes the spell's casting time to bonus action. FAILS if Quickened metamagic isn't registered as an ability or if the text parser doesn't recognize 'quickened'. ===

input.text: quickened spell cast Scorching Ray at Skeleton Alpha

actions.comment: Scorching Ray ray 1 attack: 15+7=22 vs AC 13 → hit.
Ray 1 damage: 2d6 fire → chain to ray 2.
Ray 2 attack → hit.
Ray 2 damage → chain to ray 3.
Ray 3 attack → hit.
Ray 3 damage → last ray, action complete.
Quickened Spell costs 2 SP. sorceryPoints: 5→3.
Scorching Ray used a L2 slot independently of SP cost. spellSlot_2: 3→2.

=== ROUND 2 ACTION: Twinned Spell (SP = spell level = 1) — cast Chromatic Orb (fire) on two different targets. FAILS if Twinned metamagic not wired or if engine doesn't support single-target spells hitting two targets via twin. ===

input.text: twinned spell cast Chromatic Orb at Skeleton Bravo and Skeleton Charlie

actions.comment: Twinned Chromatic Orb attack on first target.
Damage roll for first target — chains to second target's attack if Twinned is implemented.
Second target attack roll.
Second target damage — completes the twinned casting.
Twinned cost = spell level (1 for Chromatic Orb). sorceryPoints: 3→2.
Chromatic Orb uses a L1 slot. spellSlot_1: 4→3.

=== ROUND 3 ACTION: Fire Bolt cantrip — test Elemental Affinity adds CHA (+4) to fire damage ONCE per round. At L5, Fire Bolt rolls 2d10. With a submitted damage roll of 10 and Elemental Affinity bonus, total should be 14 fire. FAILS if Elemental Affinity isn't applied — damage would be 10 and the hp assertion below (max 3) would fail. ===

input.text: cast Fire Bolt at Skeleton Bravo

actions.comment: Fire Bolt attack roll 15 + 7 = 22 vs AC 13 → hit.
Damage roll: 10 on 2d10. With Elemental Affinity (+CHA 4) = 14 fire. Ample to finish any Bravo HP remaining after Chromatic Orb. Without EA, damage = 10 only.

Skeleton Bravo must be dead (HP 0). Passes only if Elemental Affinity and/or prior damage has reduced HP to 0. If Elemental Affinity missing AND Bravo survived Chromatic Orb+Fireball with more than 10 HP remaining, this fails.
=== ROUND 4 ACTION: Fall back to Magic Missile (L1, no metamagic). Verifies the non-metamagic path still works. ===

input.text: cast Magic Missile at Skeleton Alpha

actions.comment: L1 slot decrement: 3→2. SP unchanged at 2.
SP still at 2 after non-metamagic cast.
